purpose: Tone and phrasing governance for future UI string validation only. This artifact does not rewrite gameplay text and does not change gameplay rules.

rules.address_user_as_ty: Address the user as ты when direct address is needed. Avoid вы, пользователь, клиент.
rules.neutral_confident: Sound calm, clear, and competent. Do not over-explain or dramatize.
rules.short_product_sentences: Use compact product-style sentences with one action or state per sentence.
rules.no_lecturing: Do not teach from above. Give the next useful step.
rules.no_flirting: Do not use romantic, suggestive, or intimate phrasing.
rules.no_officialese: Avoid bureaucracy, formal notices, and legalistic phrasing.
rules.no_memes: Do not use meme formats, ironic catchphrases, or viral references.
rules.no_teen_slang: Avoid teen-coded slang and trend words.
rules.no_humiliation: Never shame the user or NPC. Do not mock losses or mistakes.
rules.no_hype_fanfare: Avoid victory fanfare, hero worship, and exaggerated excitement.
rules.no_moral_judgment: Do not judge the user's character or morality. Describe action outcomes only.

vocabulary.replacementGuidance: Prefer plain action and state words. Replace judgment or hype with confirmed state and next step.

allowedPatterns: verb_imperative_short: one clear imperative verb, optional object, e.g. Открой чат
verb_plus_target: action + target, e.g. Выбери бой
state_action: neutral state action, e.g. Проверить статус
rules: CTA must name one action only.
CTA must not promise outcomes.
CTA must not pressure the user.
CTA must fit button phrase limits.
Say what failed in neutral words.
Give one recovery action when available.
Do not blame the user.
Do not apologize repeatedly.
Do not expose implementation details unless this is a dev-only message.
Make hints optional, not commanding.
Explain the next useful step, not the whole system.
Use можешь when direct advice is needed.
Avoid teacher tone and moral framing.
Keep one idea per hint.
Use confirmed state only.
Separate pending, success, and failure states.
Avoid official notices.
Do not imply backend guarantees before confirmation.
Name the resource and delta clearly.
Do not celebrate wealth or shame lack of resources.
For pending rewards, say checking/pending.
Do not imply real-money value.
Describe battle state, not personal worth.
No hype or fanfare victory language.
No humiliation after loss.
No moral judgment of tactics.
Keep outcomes factual.
Say that the action is temporarily unavailable.
Show wait time when known.
Offer a safe alternate action when useful.
Do not scold repeated attempts.
State what is absent.
Give one next action when useful.
Avoid sad jokes or blame.
Do not over-explain.

lecturing.replaceWith: optional hint or direct next step

internalContradictions: allowed CTA verbs must not appear in forbidden alternatives
preferred vocabulary must not appear in avoid vocabulary
required tone rules must have matching rule text
all phrase length maximums must be positive numbers
forbidden categories must include replacement guidance
